pages.name: Home
pages.description: Main entry point to the cosmetic dentistry clinic website with quick access to key tasks and shortcuts to whitening, veneers, Invisalign, offers, financing, locations, and the smile assessment.
primary_functions: Provide clear navigation to treatments, smile assessment, locations, dentists, offers, financing, and gallery.
Highlight featured treatments such as whitening, veneers, Invisalign, and new-patient offers.
Offer prominent calls-to-action for booking appointments, starting the smile assessment, or finding a nearby clinic.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on featured 'Teeth Whitening' treatment card or CTA from the hero section.
Click on a veneers-focused CTA in the featured treatments section.
Click on primary CTA such as 'Start Smile Assessment'.
Click on 'Find a Clinic' CTA.
Click on 'New Patient Offers' banner or card.
Click on a hero or card CTA like '0% Invisalign Payment Plans'.
Click on 'Meet Our Cosmetic Dentists' link or card.
Click on 'See Before & After Smiles' link or card.

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry via 'Home' link.
Default landing URL at index.html.

pages.name: Treatments
pages.description: Category-based treatments listing page where users browse whitening, veneers, Invisalign and other cosmetic treatments, then filter/sort to find specific options.
primary_functions: Display treatment categories such as Teeth Whitening, Veneers, Invisalign, and other cosmetic services.
When a categoryId is selected (e.g., teeth_whitening, veneers), list relevant treatments with key info (price range, duration, type).
Provide filters for treatment type (e.g., in-office vs at-home), maximum price, and duration ranges (e.g., 6090 minutes).
Allow sorting of treatments (e.g., by price low-to-high) and link each treatment card to its treatment detail page.

incoming_params.description: TreatmentCategory.slug indicating which category to show (e.g., 'teeth_whitening', 'veneers').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a treatment card in the category listing.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Treatments' main navigation link (default category view).
Direct deep link to a specific category using ?category=teeth_whitening or ?category=veneers.

pages.name: Treatment Detail
pages.description: Detailed treatment information page for a specific cosmetic procedure such as whitening or veneers, including pricing, duration, booking, and financing entry points.
primary_functions: Present comprehensive treatment information: description, benefits, indications, pricing, and typical duration.
For veneers and similar treatments, show price per tooth and provide a quantity selector or cost estimator (e.g., calculate total for 4 teeth).

Offer a 'Book Appointment' or 'Request Appointment' form allowing users to choose patient type (e.g., new patient), select date and time (e.g., Thursday at 3:00 PM), and enter contact details and comments.
Provide a 'Get Estimate' function (for treatments coming from the Smile Assessment) to request an emailed cost estimate for the specific treatment.
Include a 'Get Financing' button that deep-links to the Financing page preselecting the relevant treatment so users can explore payment plans.

incoming_params.description: Treatment.id for the treatment to display in detail.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Get Financing' button to explore payment plans for this treatment.

access_methods.description: Accessed via treatment_detail.html?treatmentId=... from listings, recommendations, or offer links.
Shared directly in marketing campaigns using a full URL containing the treatmentId.

pages.name: Locations
pages.description: Searchable directory of clinic locations with filters for distance, opening hours, and emergency care, used to find nearby clinics such as those open on Sundays.
primary_functions: Allow users to search for clinics by ZIP/postal code (e.g., 94103) and set a maximum radius (e.g., 15 miles).
Provide filters for availability such as 'Open Sundays' and update the list of clinics accordingly.
List clinics sorted by distance, showing key details (name, distance, hours) and link each to its clinic detail page.

incoming_params.description: ZIP/postal code to prefill the clinic search field.
Optional radius in miles to preset the distance filter.
If set to 'true', pre-check the 'Open Sundays' availability filter.
If set to 'emergency', emphasize clinics with emergency care; used by footer 'Emergency Dentistry' link.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a clinic card in the search results list.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Locations' main navigation link.
Footer 'Emergency Dentistry' link navigates with careType=emergency.

pages.name: Clinic Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for a specific clinic location, showing address, map, hours (including Sunday), services, and emergency care information plus general appointment booking.
primary_functions: Display clinic-specific information such as address, map, phone numbers, office hours (including Sunday availability), and offered services.
Highlight an 'Emergency Care' or 'Emergency Dentistry' section explaining urgent care availability at this clinic.
Provide a clear 'Emergency Contact Form' or 'Request Emergency Call' button linking to the emergency contact page for this clinic.
Offer optional standard appointment booking options for that location (e.g., general checkups or cosmetic consultations).

incoming_params.description: Clinic.id specifying which clinic's details to show.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Emergency Contact Form' or 'Request Emergency Call' within the Emergency Care section.

access_methods.description: Accessed via clinic_detail.html?clinicId=... from the Locations page or other links.

pages.name: Emergency Contact
pages.description: Dedicated emergency dentistry contact page displaying a clinic-specific urgent care form for issues like broken teeth or dental trauma.
primary_functions: Collect emergency details including patient name, phone number, issue type (e.g., broken tooth, dental trauma), and a brief description of the problem.
Allow users to specify a preferred contact timeframe (e.g., 'Within 2 hours') to indicate urgency.
Associate the request with a selected clinic (passed from the clinic detail page) and submit the emergency contact request to the practice.

incoming_params.description: Clinic.id indicating which clinic will receive the emergency request.

access_methods.description: Accessed via emergency_contact.html?clinicId=... from a clinic's Emergency Care section.
Emergency form submission stays on the page and shows a confirmation state after calling submitEmergencyContactRequest.

pages.name: Dentists Directory
pages.description: Filterable directory of dentists with cosmetic focus, allowing users to narrow by specialty, gender, experience, and rating to find a suitable cosmetic dentist.
primary_functions: List all dentists with key summary information (name, specialty, years of experience, rating).
Provide filters for specialty (e.g., Cosmetic Dentistry), gender (e.g., Female), minimum years of experience (e.g., 8+), and minimum rating (e.g., 4.7).
Allow sorting of dentists by criteria such as highest rating or top rated.
Link each dentist card to the corresponding dentist profile page.

incoming_params.description: Optional preset for primary_specialty filter such as 'cosmetic_dentistry'.
Optional preset gender filter (e.g., 'female').
Optional minimum years of experience filter (e.g., 8).
Optional minimum rating filter (e.g., 4.7).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a dentist card in the directory list.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Our Dentists' main navigation link.
Deep links like dentists.html?specialty=cosmetic_dentistry&gender=female to prefilter the list.

pages.name: Dentist Profile
pages.description: Profile page for an individual dentist, highlighting cosmetic experience, reviews, and providing a direct consultation request workflow.
primary_functions: Display detailed information about the dentist, including training, cosmetic dentistry experience (years), patient reviews, and rating.
Provide a 'Book with Dr. [Name]' or 'Request Consultation' button that opens an in-page booking interface.

Allow users to select visit type (e.g., in-person consultation), choose the earliest available date within the next 14 days, select a specific time (e.g., 10:00 AM), and enter contact information to request a consultation.

incoming_params.description: Dentist.id for the dentist whose profile should be displayed.

access_methods.description: Accessed via dentist_profile.html?dentistId=... from the Dentists Directory or other links.

pages.name: Smile Assessment
pages.description: Interactive multi-step assessment that collects cosmetic concerns, goals, and constraints, then shows recommended treatments with filtering and estimate request options.
primary_functions: Guide users through multi-step questions about cosmetic concerns (e.g., crooked teeth, stained teeth) and goals.
Generate a list of recommended treatments based on responses, each with indicative cost and treatment duration.
Provide filters on the recommendations for maximum estimated cost (e.g., under $2,500) and treatment duration (e.g., up to 6 months).
Allow users to sort or visually identify treatments with the highest patient satisfaction and click through to the corresponding treatment detail page.
Link to a 'Get Estimate' function on the selected treatment, enabling users to request an emailed estimate.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a specific recommended treatment card in the recommendations list.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Smile Assessment' main navigation link.
Linked from homepage hero CTAs and other promotional content.

pages.name: Special Offers
pages.description: Listing page for all active promotions and special offers, including new-patient deals, whitening, Invisalign, and other cosmetic discounts.
primary_functions: Display all active special offers with brief descriptions, prices, and key inclusions.
Provide filters by offer type (e.g., New Patient, Whitening, Invisalign) and by maximum price (e.g., under $199).
Enable users to find specific offers such as a new-patient exam, X-rays, and cleaning package under a defined price threshold.
Link each listed offer to its detailed offer page.

incoming_params.description: Preset offer_type filter such as 'new_patient', used by the 'New Patient Offers' footer and homepage links.
Optional maximum price filter in dollars (e.g., 199).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an offer card in the offers listing.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Special Offers' main navigation link.
Footer 'New Patient Offers' link points to offers.html?categoryId=new_patient.

pages.name: Offer Detail
pages.description: Detailed promotion page describing inclusions, terms, validity dates, and a booking form tied to the specific offer.
primary_functions: Display full details of an offer, including what is included (e.g., exam, X-rays, cleaning), price, and any restrictions.
Show validity information and date ranges so users can confirm that the offer is valid through specific dates (e.g., March 31, 2026).
Provide a 'Claim Offer' or 'Book with This Offer' button that opens an appointment booking form tied to the promotion.

Allow users to select a clinic location, choose a date (e.g., a Tuesday in March 2026), pick a time slot (e.g., 9:00 AM), ensure any promo code is applied, and submit their personal details to request the appointment.

incoming_params.description: Offer.id indicating which offer to show.

access_methods.description: Accessed via offer_detail.html?offerId=... from the Special Offers listing or homepage featured offers.

pages.name: Financing & Payment Plans
pages.description: Central financing hub with a calculator for various treatments (especially Invisalign and veneers), allowing configuration, saving, and applying for 0% interest payment plans.
primary_functions: Provide a treatment selector (e.g., Invisalign, veneers, whitening) and a 'Treatment Cost' field where users can enter total cost (e.g., $4,800 or the calculated cost for 4 veneers).
Offer a 0% interest / no interest toggle to limit results to interest-free plans.
Include a term length slider or dropdown that dynamically calculates the estimated monthly payment, allowing users to adjust until payments are at or below a target amount (e.g., $150 or $200).

Provide an 'Apply Now' or 'Request This Plan' form where users can enter name, phone, email, employment status (e.g., full-time), monthly income (e.g., 4000), and desired monthly payment (e.g., 200) to submit a financing application.
Include a 'Save Plan' or 'Email Me This Plan' option to capture a user's preferred plan details (e.g., for veneers) along with name and email so the plan can be recorded or sent to them.

incoming_params.description: Type of treatment for financing context such as 'invisalign', 'veneers', or 'teeth_whitening'.
Optional Treatment.id when the user clicked 'Get Financing' from a specific treatment.
Human-readable treatment name to display in the calculator context.
Optional pre-populated cost (e.g., total for 4 veneers or $4800 Invisalign) to seed the calculator.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Financing' main navigation link.
Deep-linked from treatment details using financing.html?treatmentType=...&treatmentId=...&treatmentCost=....

pages.name: Smile Gallery
pages.description: Before-and-after gallery of cosmetic cases with filters helping users find relevant examples such as composite bonding on front teeth completed in 1–2 visits.
primary_functions: Display a grid of case thumbnails showing before-and-after smiles with brief captions.
Provide filters for treatment type (e.g., Composite Bonding), tooth area (e.g., Front teeth), and number of visits (e.g., 12 visits).
Allow users to refine the gallery using these filters and then click a case thumbnail to view its detailed case page.

incoming_params.description: Optional filter preset for treatment_type such as 'composite_bonding' or 'veneers'.
Optional filter preset for tooth_area such as 'front_teeth'.
Optional encoded range for number_of_visits, e.g., '1-2'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a case thumbnail in the gallery grid.
Click on a 'My Favorites' icon or link in the gallery toolbar.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Smile Gallery' main navigation link.
Deep link with preset filters such as smile_gallery.html?treatmentType=composite_bonding&toothArea=front_teeth.

pages.name: Case Detail
pages.description: Detailed case view showing larger before-and-after images, case description, and ability to save or unsave the case to a personal favorites list.
primary_functions: Show larger before-and-after images, treatment description, number of visits, and notes about the case.
Enable users to add or remove the case from their personal favorites via an 'Add to Favorites' or 'Save Case' button.
Provide navigation controls to return to the filtered gallery or move to adjacent cases.

incoming_params.description: SmileGalleryCase.id for the case to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'View My Favorites' link/button after saving a case.

access_methods.description: Accessed via case_detail.html?caseId=... from the Smile Gallery results or Favorites list.

pages.name: Favorites / Saved Cases
pages.description: User’s personal list of saved smile gallery cases with the ability to manage favorites and request a similar cosmetic result for a chosen case.
primary_functions: List all cases that the user has saved from the Smile Gallery, with thumbnails and basic details.
Allow users to review, reorder, or remove cases from their saved list.

Provide a 'Request Similar Result' or 'I Want This Smile' button for each saved case, opening an in-page form where users can enter their name, phone, and a message (e.g., requesting a similar composite bonding result on front teeth).
Submit consultation or information requests that reference a specific saved case to the clinic.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved case thumbnail to view full before-and-after details.

access_methods.description: Accessed from a 'Favorites' icon or link in the Smile Gallery and Case Detail pages.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background page about the cosmetic dentistry clinic, philosophy, technology, and overall team, with CTAs to key areas like dentists, gallery, and consultations.
primary_functions: Explain the clinics mission, expertise in cosmetic dentistry, technology used, and patient care approach.
Introduce the practice at a high level and direct users to key actions such as meeting the dentists, viewing the gallery, or booking consultations.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on CTA like 'Meet Our Cosmetic Dentists'.
Click on CTA like 'View Our Smile Transformations'.
Click on CTA like 'Contact Us for a Consultation'.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' link in the footer.
Can be accessed directly via about.html for informational purposes.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact page containing phone, email, a brief locations overview, and a non-urgent inquiry form.
primary_functions: Provide general contact information including phone numbers, email addresses, and a summary of locations.
Offer a simple contact form where users can submit questions, comments, or non-urgent requests to the clinic.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'Find a Clinic Near You' link or button after entering a ZIP hint.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' link in the footer.
Accessible directly via contact.html for general inquiries.

pages.name: Privacy & Terms
pages.description: Legal page describing the site’s privacy policy and terms of use, including data usage for forms, appointments, financing, and favorites.
primary_functions: Present the clinics privacy policy, including how user data (e.g., form submissions, favorites) is handled.
Outline terms of use and any disclaimers related to medical information provided on the site.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Privacy & Terms' link in the footer.

header_links.description: Homepage and main starting point for all tasks.
Browse cosmetic treatments including whitening, veneers, and Invisalign.
Take a guided smile assessment to get recommended treatments.
View and filter cosmetic dentists by specialty, experience, and rating.
Find nearby clinics, see hours, and choose a location.
Browse before-and-after cases and save your favorite results.
See current promotions and new-patient specials.
Explore 0% interest payment plans and apply for financing.

footer_links.description: Learn more about the clinic and its cosmetic dentistry philosophy.
Get in touch with the clinic for general inquiries.
View special promotions for new patients, including exam and cleaning deals.
Find clinics that provide emergency dental care and access the emergency contact form.
Start the smile assessment to discover suitable cosmetic treatments.
Read the website’s privacy policy and terms of use.
